nodes.name: Ferruginous pygmy owl
nodes.summary: Ferruginous pygmy owl（Ferruginous pygmy owl，学名 Glaucidium brasilianum），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联12个分布地点节点。

links.key: bird-ferruginous-pygmy-owl-165133fa__distributed_in__loc-國際自然保護聯盟瀕危物種紅色名錄-ddaff039

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: ridgwayi in Honduras | status = LC | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | status2 = CITES_A2 | status2_system = CITES | status2_ref = | genus = Glaucidium | species = brasilianum | authority = (Gmelin, JF, 1788) | range_map = Glaucidium brasilianum map.svg | range_map_caption = Distribution of ferruginous pygmy owl }} The ferruginous pygmy owl (Glaucidium brasilianum) is a small owl that breeds in south-central Arizona and southern Texas in the United States, south through Mexico and Central America, to South America into Brazil, Bolivia, Paraguay and Argentina
